items.superseding_construct: emRasterLayout / emLinearLayout / emPackLayout (C++); RasterLayout / LinearLayout / PackLayout (Rust, layout/raster.rs, layout/linear.rs, layout/pack.rs)
items.notes: Explicitly deprecated in C++ header. The class itself has no Rust equivalent; its functionality is split across the three modern layout classes.
Deprecated constructor. Superseded by constructors of the three modern layout types.
C++ explicit destructor. Rust uses RAII / Drop trait automatically.
Functionality available via RasterLayout::row_major public field.
Superseded by direct field assignment on RasterLayout.
C++ shortcut that sets pref+forced. In Rust, these are separate fields on RasterLayout.
C++ supports per-cell preferred tallness via idx. Rust uses a single scalar field.

items.symbol: emTiling::SetPrefChildTallness(double pct, int idx, bool allFurther)
items.notes: Per-cell PCT array not replicated in Rust (emTiling is deprecated anyway).
Forced tallness concept is not ported for emTiling; use RasterLayout strict_raster or tallness clamp fields.

items.symbol: emTiling::SetSpace(double l, double t, double h, double v, double r, double b)
emTiling::SetSpace(double lr, double tb, double h, double v)
emTiling::SetOuterSpace(double l, double t, double r, double b)

items.superseding_construct: PanelBehavior::layout_children trait method implemented on RasterLayout (layout/raster.rs)
items.notes: C++ virtual dispatch replaced by trait object dispatch in Rust.

items.superseding_construct: emLinearGroup / emRasterGroup / emPackGroup (C++); LinearGroup / RasterGroup / PackGroup (Rust)
items.notes: Explicitly deprecated in C++ header. Functionality is split into the three modern group types. The internal emGroup(notWarningDeprecatedForInternalUse) variant is used by emRadioButton::Group which maps to RadioGroup in Rust.
Internal-use constructor used to create a non-deprecated group for emRadioButton. Rust uses RadioGroup which does not extend the deprecated emGroup path.

items.architectural_note: Rust consolidates emLinearLayout and emLinearGroup into a single file (layout/linear.rs) with two distinct structs: LinearLayout (pure layout, non-focusable) and LinearGroup (with border, focusable). C++ uses class inheritance; Rust uses composition via PanelBehavior trait.

items.notes: Corresponds to LinearLayout::horizontal() / LinearLayout::vertical() / LinearLayout::adaptive(). C++ sets non-focusable by default; Rust LinearLayout has no border by default.
Corresponds to LinearLayout::horizontal() constructor or setting orientation = Orientation::Horizontal.
Corresponds to LinearLayout::vertical() constructor or setting orientation = Orientation::Vertical.
Corresponds to reading LinearLayout::orientation when it is Orientation::Adaptive { tallness_threshold }.
Corresponds to LinearLayout::adaptive(threshold) or setting orientation = Orientation::Adaptive { tallness_threshold }.
Corresponds to looking up ChildConstraint::weight from LinearLayout::child_constraints.
Corresponds to LinearLayout::default_constraint.weight assignment (sets all children to the same weight).
Corresponds to setting both min_tallness and max_tallness to the same value in ChildConstraint.
Corresponds to setting default_constraint.min_tallness = default_constraint.max_tallness = tallness.
Corresponds to LinearLayout::alignment_h and alignment_v fields.
Corresponds to LinearLayout::with_alignment_h / with_alignment_v or direct field assignment.

items.symbol: emLinearLayout::SetSpace(double l, double t, double h, double v, double r, double b)
items.notes: Corresponds to constructing a Spacing struct and assigning to LinearLayout::spacing.

items.symbol: emLinearLayout::SetSpace(double lr, double tb, double h, double v)
emLinearLayout::SetOuterSpace(double l, double t, double r, double b)

items.notes: Corresponds to PanelBehavior::layout_children on LinearLayout. C++ virtual dispatch replaced by trait object dispatch.
Private method. Corresponds to LinearLayout::calculate_force. Fully ported including iterative conflict resolution.

items.architectural_note: C++ emLinearGroup inherits from emLinearLayout. In Rust, LinearGroup is a separate struct that composes LinearLayout and Border, implementing PanelBehavior. Both classes are co-located in layout/linear.rs.

items.notes: Corresponds to LinearGroup::horizontal() and LinearGroup::vertical() constructors.

items.architectural_note: C++ emPackLayout and emPackGroup are consolidated into layout/pack.rs as PackLayout and PackGroup structs. Rust uses composition + PanelBehavior trait instead of C++ inheritance.

items.notes: Corresponds to PackLayout::with_min_cell_count or direct field assignment.
Corresponds to reading ChildConstraint::weight from PackLayout::child_constraints.
Corresponds to PackLayout::set_default_weight which also clears per-child overrides.
Corresponds to PackLayout::set_default_preferred_tallness which clears per-child overrides.
Logic inlined in PackLayout::do_layout_inner as min_cell_count.saturating_sub(items.len()) padding loop.
Corresponds to Packer struct construction with cum_weight / cum_log_pct prefix sums.
Corresponds to free function rate_cell in layout/pack.rs.
Corresponds to PackItem struct in layout/pack.rs.
Corresponds to Packer struct in layout/pack.rs (holds items + prefix sums).

items.architectural_note: C++ emPackGroup inherits from emPackLayout. In Rust, PackGroup composes PackLayout and Border fields, implementing PanelBehavior. Both are co-located in layout/pack.rs.
C++ emRasterLayout and emRasterGroup are consolidated into layout/raster.rs as RasterLayout and RasterGroup structs. Rust uses composition + PanelBehavior trait instead of C++ inheritance.

items.notes: Corresponds to RasterLayout::with_columns or fixed_columns field assignment.
Corresponds to RasterLayout::with_rows or fixed_rows field assignment.
Corresponds to RasterLayout::with_min_cell_count or field assignment.
Corresponds to RasterLayout::with_preferred_tallness or field assignment.
Corresponds to setting preferred_child_tallness = min_child_tallness = max_child_tallness on RasterLayout.
Corresponds to RasterLayout::with_strict_raster or field assignment.

items.symbol: emRasterLayout::SetSpace(double l, double t, double h, double v, double r, double b)
items.notes: Corresponds to constructing a Spacing struct and assigning to RasterLayout::spacing.

emRasterLayout::SetOuterSpace(double l, double t, double r, double b)

items.architectural_note: C++ emRasterGroup inherits from emRasterLayout. In Rust, RasterGroup composes RasterLayout and Border fields, implementing PanelBehavior. Both are co-located in layout/raster.rs.
